summary: Russian Rubicon Drone Center operators destroyed a Ukrainian assault group near Pokrovsk, hitting an M1A1 Abrams tank, M1117 APC, and BMP-2 during an advance under fog cover near Hryshyne. In March 2026, Rubicon achieved a record 3,170 published strikes, exceeding its November 2025 record by over 40% and increasing target destruction 5.7 times year-over-year. Hezbollah used fiber-optic FPV drones to strike two Namer APCs and a HMMWV near the Lebanese border, with the HMMWV catching fire. Ukrainian forces in the Kostiantynivka direction detected and survived a Russian FPV drone attack, with a drone detector alerting them at 0:11 in footage from the 36th Marine Brigade. Russian FPV drones also struck a downed Ka-52 near Nadiivka, eliminating the crew during their evacuation attempt.
